'''Ooo-sek''' was one of the first [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] colony [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. Its swamps were home to a [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plant]] known as [[yo'uqiol]], [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]] for "Hand of [[Death/Legends|Death]]." Ooo-sek also boasted vast jungles rife with flora and fauna, making it an ideal hunting ground for adventurous Rodians to train as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
